description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house surrounded by a well-maintained yard with several mature trees and shrubs. The house features a symmetrical facade with multiple arched windows and doors, and is partially covered in green climbing vines. The front includes a prominent entryway with a wooden door, flanked by windows and a small porch area. The rear of the property has a spacious patio and what appears to be a swimming pool, while the side includes a detached garage with a gabled roof and double wooden doors. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and bordered by paved walkways and driveways, giving it a suburban, upscale appearance.
description: A large, two-story house with arched windows, a vine-covered facade, detached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, arched windows, climbing vines, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: View from the garage side, highlighting the double garage doors, driveway, and side yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, swimming pool, and symmetrical arrangement of arched doors and windows.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, showing the wooden fence, side yard, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of arched windows and doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched wooden door with small porch, flanked by windows and covered in climbing vines
